StringData.String: What would you like to do with the {%ITEM_NAME%}?
We're Sorry, but you need {%QUANTITY%} more Crowns in order to buy {%ITEM_NAME%}. Would you like to get more Crowns so that you can purchase {%ITEM_NAME%}?
We're Sorry, but you need {%QUANTITY%} more Crowns in order to buy gold. Would you like to get more Crowns so that you can purchase gold?

We're Sorry, but you need {%QUANTITY%} more Gold in order to buy {%ITEM_NAME%}. You can convert Crowns into Gold so that you can purchase {%ITEM_NAME%}. Would you like to get more Crowns now so that you can purchase {%ITEM_NAME%}?

We're Sorry, but you need {%QUANTITY%} more Gold in order to buy {%ITEM_NAME%}. You can convert Crowns into Gold so that you can purchase {%ITEM_NAME%}. Would you like to get more Crowns now so that you can purchase {%ITEM_NAME%}?
Choose a package to purchase more Gold. Use gold to improve your castle and buy equipment for your hero.
You do not have enough Crowns for any of these packages. Purchase more Crowns before converting them to Gold.
We're Sorry, but you need {%QUANTITY%} more Gold in order to buy {%ITEM_NAME%}.
We're Sorry, but you need {%QUANTITY%} more Gold in order for this purchase.
Click the button below to complete your purchase.
Would you like to heal your hero?
Would you like to heal your hero?
You are one step closer towards becoming legendary.
Tales of a hero's journey grow into legend over time.
You can bring up to {%maxNumber%} heroes into each fight. Are you sure that you would like to face the enemy without more backup?
Are you sure you would like to skip the tutorial? If you do, we will bring you to your castle and give you some gold and xp.
This is only recommended if you are unable to complete the tutorial due to experiencing bugs. Please check the forums at social.bioware.com to report issues.
"I've earned you some gold. Visit my castle to collect it."
You cannot begin your legendary adventure until your hero has a name. Enter it below.
You cannot begin your legendary adventure until your castle has a name. Enter it below.
Create your own warcry. Enter it below.
Congratulations, you have unlocked {%item_name%} in Dragon Age 2.
Click the button below to view your unlocked items.

Congratulations, you have unlocked the items below in Dragon Age 2. To use these items in Dragon Age 2 on Xbox 360, PS3 or PC, sign in below with the same EA Account you will use to play Dragon Age 2.
The following items have just been added to your EA Account. You can now start using them in Dragon Age 2.
You have unlocked bonus items in Dragon Age 2. To use these items in Dragon Age 2 on Xbox 360, PS3 or PC, sign in below with the same EA Account you will use to play Dragon Age 2.
Friends will help you win battles.
They can also send you Friend Gold and FREE gifts!
{%friend_name%}'s hero, {%friend_hero_name%}, paid the ultimate price while at your side in battle.
You are about to send a gift.
Would you like to buy additional battle slots to add more friends to your party?
Would you like to refill your Challenge Tokens so you can instantly continue to battle your friends?
Would you like to use Smelling Salts to revive your hero?
Would you like to use a Smelling Salt from your backpack to revive your hero?
Smelling Salts will instantly revive your hero with full health so you can continue the fight.
Would you like to pay gold to revive your hero?
You will be instantly revived with full health so you can continue the fight.
Would you like to use Evra's Horn to call {%target_name%} to Battle?
Would you like to use an Evra's Horn from your backpack to call {%target_name%} to Battle?
{%target_name%} is not in your guild. Would you like to use Evra's Horn to call {%target_name%} to Battle?
{%target_name%} is not in your guild. Would you like to use an Evra's Horn from your backpack to call {%target_name%} to Battle?
Evra's Horn will instantly add {%target_name%} to your party with Full health.
Would you like to pay gold to recruit {%target_name%} to this battle?
{%target_name%} will be added to your party with full health.
Your hero has reached his current level cap. You cannot earn any more XP until you raise your level cap by upgrading your Hero Room.
You can upgrade your Hero Room now for {%amount%} {COIN,1}. Would you like to upgrade your hero room to raise your level cap to {%newLevelCap%}?
You need {%amount%} {COIN,1} to upgrade your level cap to {%newLevelCap%}. Would you like to purchase gold now?
Your hero has reached Dragon Age Legends maximum level. This level cap may increase with future updates to the game.
Until then, we hope you continue your legendary adventure. There are always more quests to complete and more darkspawn to slay.

You may have already earned one of several promo packs for playing EA games like Dragon Age 2, Mass Effect 2 or Dead Space 2 and signing in with your EA account. Link your account below to check for packs.

You may have already earned one of several promo packs for playing EA games like Dragon Age 2, Mass Effect 2 or Dead Space 2 and signing in with your EA account. Check for packs by pressing the button below.
You may have already earned the {%pack_name%} pack by signing in to {%game_name%} with your EA account. To check if you have earned the {%pack_name%} pack, please sign in to your EA Account below.
You may have already earned the {%pack_name%} pack by signing in to {%game_name%} with your EA account. To check if you have earned the {%pack_name%} pack, please use the button below.
Thank you for playing {%game_name%}. As a reward, the {%pack_name%} pack has been added to your hero's inventory. Enjoy your Legendary Adventure!

Thank you for checking your Crate. Unfortunately, we did not find any new items for you, only this bag of {%num_coins%} Gold. You can check for promotional packs at any time by pressing the Promo Pack button on the Options menu.
We're sorry, but we did not find any new promotional items for you. You can check for promotional packs at any time by pressing the Promo Pack button on the Options menu.
You may have already earned the {%pack_name%} pack by signing up to participate in the Closed Beta. To check if you have earned the {%pack_name%} pack, please sign in to your EA Account below.
You may have already earned the {%pack_name%} pack by signing up to participate in the Closed Beta. To check if you have earned the {%pack_name%} pack, please use the button below.
Thank you for participating in the Closed Beta! As a reward, the items found below have been added to your hero's inventory. Enjoy your Legendary Adventure!
To earn the {%pack_name%} pack, link to your EA Account below.
Hit check to get Medieval with the Sims.
You may have already earned the {%pack_name%} pack by using the Origin store. To check if you have earned the {%pack_name%} pack, please sign in to your EA Account below.
You may have already earned the {%pack_name%} pack using the Origin store. To check if you have earned the {%pack_name%} pack, please use the button below.
Congratulations! You have successfully redeemed your exclusive Origin Promo Pack. Your items will show up in your inventory.
You have been credited the Customer Service Promo Pack for your troubles. We hope these items will improve your playing experience. Your items will show up in your inventory. Be Legendary!
Dragon Age Legends is currently in Open Beta. During this time, you are free to start the game over and play as a new hero.

You will keep any {CROWN,1,-4} Balance you have, but all other game data will be erased, including any premium items you have purchased. By clicking the button below, you acknowledge that your existing data will be cleared and premium items will be erased.
Re-spec allows you to redistribute the skills and stat points you’ve earned over the course of the game.
When you re-spec, you return to Level 1 but keep all of your XP, allowing you to immediately level back up and allocate your skills and stat points in whatever new configuration you wish.
There is an error with the code you entered. Please recheck your code and try again.
The code you entered is no longer active. This code expired on {%end_date%}.
The code you entered is not valid until {%start_date%}. Please come back on that date to redeem your code.
This promotion has already been redeemed on this account.
You have been granted the {%promo_name%} with the following items:
Congratulations on completing your first battle in Guild vs Guild! As a reward, we've activated an Ultimate Alluriel's Elixir - granting you double XP for the next 72 hours!
{%friend_name%} has been added to your guild.
Let them know they achieved this great honor!
{%friend_name%} has been removed from your guild.
Let them know they are in your closest circle no longer.
{%friend_name%} has become your guild mate and you now both require 25% less rest!
Share the good news with them!
Let others know of your growing rise to power!
{%friend_name%}'s guild is not large enough to challenge.
Tell them to add more members to their guild so you can fight them.
You are about to send {%friend_name%} a gift.
Share treasures with friends! Just drag down what you want to give.
Would you like to share with your friends that you won {%item_name%}?
Congratulations on your truly epic prize!
Would you like to share with your friends that you won {%item_name%}?
Congratulations on your truly legendary prize!
Would you like to share with your friends that you won {%item_name%}?
The weapon you attempted to place in the vanity slot does not match up with the weapon type of the item currently equipped.
Example: A one-handed vanity weapon with a two-handed weapon.
